# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that deploys directly to production when code is pushed to the main branch. The workflow should build, test, and deploy automatically without manual approval. This enables our continuous deployment workflow for rapid iteration.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Deploy to Production

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Python environment
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build and deploy
        env:
          CLOUDINARY_NAME: ${{ secrets.CLOUDINARY_NAME }}
          CLOUDINARY_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.CLOUDINARY_API_KEY }}
          CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET: ${{ secrets.CLOUDINARY_API_SECRET }}
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
        run: |
          python deploy.py
